description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image cr.d.xiaomi.net/zhangzhimin1/mace-dev2:$IMAGE_TAG_VERSION, define variables ANDROID_NDK_HOME, IMAGE_TAG_VERSION, MI_9_SE, MI_NOTE_3, REDMI_K30_PRO, SIRIUS and stages .pre, linting, build, test, benchmark, model_validate, .post. In the .pre stage add a check-env job that runs `adb devices`, `ls -lh ~/.ssh`, and `ssh pi@10.221.225.200 echo "Hi, This is raspberrypi"` on a mace-host runner, and a clean-device-workspace job that runs only on schedule and executes `adb -s $REDMI_K30_PRO shell "rm -rf /data/local/tmp/*"`. In the linting stage add cpplint (`sh tools/cpplint.sh`) and pylint (`pycodestyle . --filename=*.py --exclude=examples,third_party`) jobs. In the build stage add android-aarch64-gpu&quant:build (runs `RUNTIME=GPU QUANTIZE=ON tools/cmake/cmake-build-arm64-v8a.sh` then checks `libmace.so` size and stores `build/cmake-build/arm64-v8a/install` as an artifact), android-aarch64-hexagon_dsp:build (runs `RUNTIME=HEXAGON QUANTIZE=ON tools/cmake/cmake-build-arm64-v8a.sh` with the same artifact), android-aarch64-hexagon_hta:build (runs `git reset origin/hta third_party/hta && git checkout third_party/hta` then `RUNTIME=HTA QUANTIZE=ON tools/cmake/cmake-build-arm64-v8a.sh` with artifact), host-micro-cmsis:build (runs `./micro/tools/cmake/cmake-build-host.sh -DMACE_MICRO_ENABLE_TESTS=ON -DMACE_MICRO_ENABLE_CMSIS=ON`, sets `GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive` and stores `build/micro`), linux-arm-quant:build (runs `LINARO_ARM_LINUX_GNUEABIHF=/usr RUNTIME=CPU QUANTIZE=ON ./tools/cmake/cmake-build-arm-linux-gnueabihf.sh`), linux-x64:build (runs `RUNTIME=CPU QUANTIZE=ON tools/cmake/cmake-build-host.sh` and stores `build/cmake-build/host/install`), none-micro-m4:build (runs `./micro/tools/cmake/cmake-build-gcc-arm-none-eabi.sh -DARM_CPU=cortex-m7 -DMACE_MICRO_ENABLE_CMSIS=ON -DMACE_MICRO_ENABLE_TESTS=OFF` with artifact), and a manual build_docs job that runs `cd docs && make html` and stores `docs/_build`. In the test stage add android-aarch64-gpu&quant:test (pushes the built install to the device via `adb -s $REDMI_K30_PRO push ...` and runs `mace_cc_test`), linux-x64:test (lists the build directory and runs `./build/cmake-build/host/install/bin/mace_cc_test` with a complex gtest filter), and host-micro-cmsis:test (runs `build/micro/host/test/ccunit/micro_ops_test`). In the benchmark stage add android-aarch64-gpu&quant:benchmark (manual, pushes install and runs `mace_cc_benchmark` via adb) and host-micro-cmsis:benchmark (runs `build/micro/host/test/ccbenchmark/micro_cc_benchmark`). In the model_validate stage add android-aarch64-cpu/uint8:model_validate, android-aarch64-gpu:model_validate, android-aarch64-hexagon_dsp:model_validate, android-aarch64-hexagon_hta:model_validate, and linux-x64:model_validate, each cloning the mace-models repo in before_script, setting CONF_FILE to the appropriate yaml, and executing `python tools/python/convert.py --config=${CONF_FILE}` followed by `python tools/python/run_model.py --config=${CONF_FILE}` with appropriate `--target_socs`, `--target_abi=arm64-v8a` or `host`, `--validate --benchmark` and the correct `--runtime` (cpu, gpu, dsp, hta).
